src/lib/errors.js.sendError: This function sends an error response with the given status, code, and message.

src/modules/members/service.js.addMember: Adds a member to a project. Returns null if the member already exists or throws an error.
src/modules/members/service.js.getMembers: Returns all members of a project.

src/modules/members/routes.js.GET /members: Fetches and returns all members of a project.
src/modules/members/routes.js.POST /members: Adds a new member to a project. Returns the created member on success or an error response if userId or role is missing.

node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js.Layer: A class representing a single route layer in Express, handling requests and errors.
node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js.match: Checks if this route matches the given path.
